svg.title: usesteady: workflow resume-info
svg.desc: UseSteady survivability demo: 04-resume-info — animated terminal recording rendered as deterministic SVG. Reproduce: node scripts/p2-render-demo-assets.mjs
svg.text: $ # Run a 3-task workflow to produce a complete token.
File note: If config.json already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If LICENSE already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If CONTRIBUTING.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
$ # Read-only inspection — does NOT execute anything.
Resume token reports the workflow is already complete.
$ # Same data as JSON for machine consumers (CI, dashboards):
$ # === Now show a partial-completion token (1/3 done) ===
No execution occurred. No tasks ran. No workspace changes.
$ # All read-only. No tasks ran. No files changed.
